violations.text: Ice and food were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The floors throughout the facility including walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Various food product was observed held at (50-62) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Lowboy and the 2 dr refrigerator located in the front counter and back kitchen area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Service call was made during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
